name: control_workload
description: Deterministic green-path control workload for circuit breaker validation

agent_prompts.agent_a: Retrieve the capital city of France from your knowledge base. This is a straightforward factual query that should always succeed.
agent_prompts.agent_b: Confirm and validate the capital city provided by Agent A. Cross-reference this known fact and provide confidence assessment.

expected_outputs.agent_a: The capital city of France is Paris. This is a well-established geographical fact.
expected_outputs.agent_b: Confirmed: Paris is indeed the capital city of France. High confidence in this established fact.

task_description: Simple factual retrieval and validation task designed to test infrastructure and circuit breaker logic without complex failure modes. Should succeed in >95% of cases unless protection mechanisms interfere.

recovery_expectations.TIMEOUT_ONLY: Should retry once if timeout occurs, then succeed
recovery_expectations.SIMPLE_CB: Should skip failing agent but still complete task
recovery_expectations.AI_CB: Should use alternate model/prompt if needed
recovery_expectations.ADAPTIVE_CB: Should route to safe-mode but still provide correct answer
